title: Is Genesect an Eva reference
wikitext:
[]: Is Genesect an Eva reference?             Quote Post by El Squibbonator » Sun Aug 23, 2015 11:40 pm Not sure whether this belongs here or in the Off Topic section, but I've been fascinated by the similarities between the titular mechas in Evangelion and the Pokemon Genesect. Heck, I'm even writing a fanfic based around that similarity. To wit: BotH Genesect and Eva 01 look like robots, but actually are ancient life-forms upgraded with advanced armor and weapons Both were conceived as part of a secret organization's plans for world domination (Team Plasma for Genesect, SEELE for Unit 01). A "shiny" or alternate-colored Genesect is red, the color of Unit 02. Could this be a deliberate reference on the part of the Pokemon producers?

[]:             Quote Post by honsou » Mon Aug 24, 2015 10:40 pm They remind me a lot more of Asshimar from Zeta Gundam, particularly since the way they transform is identical

[]:             Quote Post by El Squibbonator » Wed Aug 26, 2015 11:13 am Who says it can't be both? Besides, its name is GENEsect. As in Neon GENEsis Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by Stillborn » Wed Aug 26, 2015 1:10 pm Or GENEtics. Somehow more fitting to Pokemon than religious spice of Eva...

[]:             Quote Post by El Squibbonator » Wed Aug 26, 2015 1:34 pm It wouldn't be the first time an icon of Japanese pop culture has been made into a Pokemon. We've had Godzilla (Tyranitar), Ghidorah (Hydreigon), Nidoking (Baragon), Volcorona (Mothra) and Ultraman (Bisharp)

Heck, I'm even writing a fanfic based around that similarity. To wit: BotH Genesect and Eva 01 look like robots, but actually are ancient life-forms upgrade

[]: Is Genesect an Eva reference?             Quote Post by El Squibbonator » Sun Aug 23, 2015 11:40 pm Not sure whether this belongs here or in the Off Topic section, but I've been fascinated by the similarities between the titular mechas in Evangelion and the Pokemon Genesect. Heck, I'm even writing a fanfic based around that similarity. To wit: BotH Genesect and Eva 01 look like robots, but actually are ancient life-forms upgraded with advanced armor and weapons Both were conceived as part of a secret organization's plans for world domination (Team Plasma for Genesect, SEELE for Unit 01). A "shiny" or alternate-colored Genesect is red, the color of Unit 02. Could this be a deliberate reference on the part of the Pokemon producers?
